title: Puravankara International Enterprises is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Puravankara International Enterprises is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara International Enterprises:
Puravankara International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara International Enterprises!
